lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਇਆ ਤੇ ਮਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh deaa te mat aootam hoe |
lines.english: By God's Kind Mercy, the intellect is exalted.
By God's Grace, enlightenment comes.
When God is totally pleased, He comes to dwell in the mind.
By God's Kind Mercy, the heart-lotus blossoms forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਹੁ ਤਿਤੁ ਲਗਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: jit jit laavahu tith lageh har naath |
lines.english: As You have delegated, so do we apply ourselves, O Lord and Master.
All treasures, O Lord, come by Your Kind Mercy.
No one obtains anything by himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਨ ਕੈ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਹਾਥ ॥੮॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak in kai kachhoo na haath |8|6|
lines.english: O Nanak, nothing is in our hands. ||8||6||
Unapproachable and Unfathomable is the Supreme Lord God;
Salok:
To the wonderful story of the Holy. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਕਹੈ ਸੁ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo kahai su mukataa hoe |
lines.english: whoever speaks of Him shall be liberated.
Listen, O friends, Nanak prays,
In the Company of the Holy, egotism is eliminated.
In the Company of the Holy, all filth is removed.
Ashtapadee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਮੁਖ ਊਜਲ ਹੋਤ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang mukh aoojal hot |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, one's face becomes radiant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਪਾਏ ਨਾਮ ਰਤਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang paae naam ratan |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, one obtains the jewel of the Naam.
In the Company of the Holy, all conflicts are settled.
In the Company of the Holy, spiritual wisdom is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਬੁਝੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang bujhai prabh neraa |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, God is understood to be near at hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਬਰਨੈ ਕਉਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kee mahimaa baranai kaun praanee |
lines.english: What mortal can speak of the Glorious Praises of the Holy?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਨੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak saadh kee sobhaa prabh maeh samaanee |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the glory of the Holy people merges into God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਏਕ ਊਪਰਿ ਜਤਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang ek aoopar jatan |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, one's efforts are directed toward the One Lord.
In the Company of the Holy, one flourishes forever.
In the Company of the Holy, one meets the Incomprehensible Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਬਸਿ ਪੰਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang aaveh bas panchaa |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, the five passions are brought to rest.
In the Company of the Holy, one's speech is enticing.
In the Company of the Holy, one becomes the dust of all.
In the Company of the Holy, one enjoys the essence of ambrosia.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਕਤਹੂੰ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang na katahoon dhaavai |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, the mind does not wander.
In the Company of the Holy, the mind becomes stable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਤੇ ਭਿੰਨ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang maaeaa te bhin |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, one is rid of Maya.
In the Company of the Holy, there is great purity.
In the Company of the Holy, O Nanak, God is totally pleased. ||2||
In the Company of the Holy, all one's enemies become friends.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਬੀਗਾ ਪੈਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang na beegaa pair |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, one's feet do not wander.
In the Company of the Holy, no one is hated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋ ਮੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang naahee ko mandaa |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, no one seems evil.
In the Company of the Holy, supreme bliss is known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤਜੈ ਸਭੁ ਆਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang tajai sabh aap |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, one renounces all selfishness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਹਉ ਤਾਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang naahee hau taap |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, the fever of ego departs.
He Himself knows the greatness of the Holy.
O Nanak, the Holy are at one with God. ||3||
In the Company of the Holy, one grasps the Incomprehensible.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang sadaa sukh paavai |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, one obtains everlasting peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang na kabahoo dhaavai |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, the mind never wanders.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਸੈ ਥਾਨਿ ਊਚੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang basai thaan aoochai |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, one abides in the loftiest place.
In the Company of the Holy, one can endure the unendurable.
In the Company of the Holy, one attains the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਪਾਏ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang paae naam nidhaan |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, one obtains the treasure of the Naam.
O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to the Holy. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੈ ਸਭਿ ਧਰਮ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang drirrai sabh dharam |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, one's Dharmic faith is firmly established.
In the Company of the Holy, one dwells with the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਭ ਕੁਲ ਉਧਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang sabh kul udhaarai |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, all one's family is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੋ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo kai sang so dhan paavai |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, that wealth is obtained.
In the Company of the Holy, one's friends, acquaintances and relatives are redeemed.
In the Company of the Holy, the divine, angelic beings sing God's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਧਨ ਤੇ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਵਰਸਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis dhan te sabh ko varasaavai |
lines.english: Everyone benefits from that wealth.
In the Company of the Holy, the Lord of Dharma serves.
In the Company of the Holy, one's sins fly away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸ੍ਰਬ ਥਾਨ ਗੰਮਿ ॥
lines.translit: saadh kai sang srab thaan gam |
lines.english: In the Company of the Holy, all places are within reach.
In the Company of the Holy, one sings the Ambrosial Glories.
